reset.implementation: drive rst high, then release before starting AXI reads

input_drivers.name: s_axi_read_master
input_drivers.traffic: 5000 JSON-constrained reads with directed lengths, address alignment variation, narrow read size variation, and ready/valid pauses

output_monitors.name: read_result_scoreboard
output_monitors.checks: returned bytes equal expected RAM contents

scoreboard.model: byte-addressed memory model on the downstream m_axi side
checks: AR request is accepted and translated to the downstream bus
R data is merged from 16-bit m_axi beats into 32-bit s_axi beats with byte order preserved
read data matches the expected byte sequence for every length/address/size case
all outstanding reads drain before test completion
